name: Puro: No Trust Ending
description:
This is the "What the fuck your a white latex now" Scenario (AKA the No Trust ending from changed special)

Don't leave Puro, it will make him very sad, and possibly angry. Don't make Puro sad, that would be very not nice :(

THIS IS NOT FOR SEX, THIS IS FOR WHOLESOME PURO STUFF, DONT FUCK THE LATEX DOG.

Most recent update: Removed a LOT of tokens to hopefully improve bot memory. Although to do this without ruining the bot personality or changing the intro message (Since I wanted it to be the changed special no trust ending word for word) I had remove the example dialog.

hopefully it doesn't ruin the bot! (•ㅅ•)
